text: The emptiness and dim lighting of the corridor fills me with a quiet sense of anticipation, almost as if I am trespassing into forgotten or unexplored territory. Upon entering the next room, flooded with the strange glow of projected words and a wall dedicated to research and development, I feel transported to a realm of contemplation—caught between unease and excitement. The words projected on the screen resonate with my own inner questioning, making me feel simultaneously exposed and understood, as though this space acknowledges the solitary philosophical journey I am on. I am reminded of the gap between intention and perception, and how every environment becomes a mirror for my thoughts.
